calculator.heading: Which plan is right for you?
calculator.subtitle: Answer 2 questions and find out.
calculator.conversationsLabel: How many conversations/mo do you have?
calculator.agentsLabel: How many AI agents do you need?

items.question: Is the Free plan really free?
items.answer: Yes. Free includes 100 conversations/mo, 1 AI agent and 10 basic building blocks. No credit card required to start. It's functional, not a demo — you can create real automations.

items.question: Is there a minimum contract period?
items.answer: No. All paid plans are monthly and you can cancel anytime without penalty. For annual plans, we offer a 17% discount.

items.question: What counts as a 'conversation'?
items.answer: A conversation is a message exchange session between your WhatsApp number and a contact within a 24-hour window. Multiple messages in the same window count as a single conversation.

items.question: Can I change plans anytime?
items.answer: Yes. You can upgrade or downgrade at any time. On upgrade, the difference is charged pro-rata. On downgrade, the credit is applied to the next cycle.

items.question: Are there additional costs for WhatsApp Cloud API?
items.answer: Catalisa does not charge for Cloud API usage itself. However, Meta charges per business-initiated conversation (per official pricing). User-initiated conversations are free for the first 1,000/mo.

items.question: How does support work?
items.answer: Free: community forum. Starter: email during business hours. Professional: priority with 8h SLA. Business: priority with 4h SLA + Slack channel. Enterprise: 24/7 with dedicated account manager.

items.question: Can I try before committing to a paid plan?
items.answer: Yes! Start with the Free plan and test with up to 100 conversations/mo. When you're ready to scale, upgrade. We also offer personalized demos for companies.

items.question: Do prices include taxes?
items.answer: Displayed prices do not include taxes. The final amount may vary depending on your location and company's tax regime.

pageCTA.heading: Ready to get started?
pageCTA.subtitle: Start free today and scale when you need to. No credit card required.
